news.headline: White House unveils Bitcoin-first strategy with key crypto leaders in March, vows to "never sell".
news.summary: Recently, former president Trump met with leaders in the crypto industry at the White House. During the meeting, he introduced a strategy that prioritizes Bitcoin, declaring his commitment to holding onto the cryptocurrency and stating he will "never sell." This move showcases Trump's support for Bitcoin and his intention to embrace the digital asset.

news.headline: Education industry adapts to deep AI integration with DeepSeek-R1, becoming the center of AI democratization wave.
news.summary: The integration of DeepSeek-R1 in the education sector became a focal point amidst the AI democratization wave. Companies rushed to incorporate this technology to cope with the changes, highlighting the industry's fast-paced adaptation to new innovations.

news.headline: Huawei introduces flagship IdeaHub ES3/S3 at MWC Barcelona 2025, bringing AI to offices for smarter collaboration.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain on March 10, 2025, Huawei introduced its leading conference whiteboard, the IdeaHub ES3/S3, at the MWC Barcelona 2025 event. The unveiling took place at the Huawei Intelligent Collaboration Forum under the theme "Embracing a Smarter Future with Boundless Collaboration." This innovative product aims to revolutionize meetings and conferences with its cutting-edge features.

news.headline: German conservatives and SPD get closer to forming coalition government.
Bybit releases report on crypto derivatives analytics as Trump creates BTC strategic reserve; world's second-largest exchange with high trading volume.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Dubai, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in the world by trading volume, Bybit, unveiled its most recent weekly report on crypto derivatives analytics with Block Scholes at the helm. Meanwhile, President Trump sanctioned an executive order to create a strategic Bitcoin reserve.

news.headline: Häagen-Dazs names 5 women as winners of The Rose Project, each awarded $100,000 bursary grant in Class of 2024.
news.summary: To mark International Women's Day, Häagen-Dazs has announced the recipients of The Rose Project for the Class of 2024: Philomena Nwajagu, Faith Ida, Lorna Phillip, Dr. Nirja Joshi, and Judit Giró Benet. This global initiative includes a bursary grant of $100,000 for each winner.

news.headline: Cascale Forum in Ho Chi Minh City on May 14-15 aims to drive actionable solutions for decarbonization, environmental performance and responsible purchasing practices in Vietnam, second-largest in textile, apparel, and footwear industry.
news.summary: A conference titled the Cascale Forum: Ho Chi Minh City will be held on May 14-15 in Amsterdam, Hong Kong, and Oakland, Calif. The event aims to gather manufacturers, suppliers, brands, retailers, and key industry stakeholders to address key issues such as decarbonization, environmental performance, responsible purchasing practices, and audit fatigue. The focus will be on promoting sustainable production practices. Vietnam, as the world's second-largest textile, apparel, and footwear producer, plays a crucial role in these discussions.

news.headline: Veritonic introduces solution for podcast demographic data, ensuring accuracy and scalability.
news.summary: In New York, Veritonic has introduced an innovative Audience Insights Solution aimed at providing precise and scalable demographic information for podcasts. This new offering is set to revolutionize the way demographic data is collected and utilized in the industry. The solution promises to deliver accurate insights into audience demographics on a large scale. By leveraging this pioneering tool, podcast creators and marketers can gain valuable information to better tailor their content and advertising strategies.

news.headline: Marqeta partners with Spendesk Financial Services to provide expense management for 4,000+ SMBs in Europe.
news.summary: Marqeta (NASDAQ: MQ) has been revealed as the issuer processor for Spendesk Financial Services (SFS) in Europe, a payment institution owned by Spendesk. Spendesk, a top spend management and procurement solution in Europe, utilizes this technology to empower its middle-market business clients with budget tracking and customization capabilities. This move highlights Marqeta's role in enabling embedded financial solutions for global innovators.

news.headline: Quectel unveils SG882G smart module with edge computing for high-performance IoT apps, measuring just 33.0 × 39.0 × 3.85 mm.
news.summary: Quectel Wireless Solutions, a prominent IoT solutions provider, has unveiled its newest flagship smart module, the SG882G, boasting powerful computing capabilities, multimedia features, and reliable connectivity for both industrial and consumer use. The module, measuring a mere 33.0 × 39.0 × 3.85 mm, offers a compact size without compromising on performance, smoothly running edge computing algorithms. With its high processing capacity, the SG882G is set to meet the demands of modern applications.

news.headline: GigaDevice displays Flash and MCU advances at Embedded World in Nuremberg, Germany, Hall 5, Stand 5-129.
news.summary: GigaDevice, a leading company in Flash and MCU technologies, is set to participate in Embedded World in Nuremberg, Germany. The event will take place in Hall 5, Stand 5-129, where GigaDevice will present its cutting-edge developments in the field. This includes their latest innovations in 32-bit MCU technology. This news was announced via Business Wire.

news.headline: Quectel introduces LG580P GNSS module with multi-constellation, multi-band support for accurate navigation.
news.summary: Quectel Wireless Solutions, a worldwide IoT solutions provider, has introduced the LG580P in Nuremburg, Germany. This new GNSS module offers high-precision positioning with multi-constellation and multi-band support. It operates on multiple signals including L1, L2, L5, and L6, facilitating real-time kinematic (RTK) positioning. The LG580P also incorporates a dual antenna heading algorithm to improve accuracy and reliability. This development comes as a solution for designers and developers aiming to create devices with advanced positioning capabilities.

news.headline: Chinese biotech sector experiencing significant growth.
Laifen launches Mini Hair Dryer in Europe, ideal for beauty on-the-go. Perfect travel companion for effortless style.
news.summary: Berlin - Laifen, a top player in personal care technology, has unveiled the Laifen Mini Hair Dryer in Europe. Launched in March 2025, this innovative product caters to beauty enthusiasts seeking convenience while on the move. Ideal for travel, the Mini Hair Dryer is designed to provide efficient styling in a compact form. This announcement comes as the beauty industry sees an increased demand for portable grooming solutions.

news.headline: Investors report holdings exceeding 5% in Alliance Pharma plc.
Investor Chamath Palihapitiya criticizes proposed 10% credit card interest rate cap as disruptive, supported by Trump and Sanders.
news.summary: Chamath Palihapitiya, a billionaire investor, has expressed his belief that implementing a 10% cap on credit card interest rates could have a significant impact on the financial services industry. Palihapitiya stated that such a move would be highly disruptive and would likely force entities in the industry to adopt more cost-effective strategies. This response from Palihapitiya was prompted by news that Congresswoman Anna Luna and Rep. Alexandria Cortez are collaborating on a proposal to limit credit card interest rates to 10%. The proposal has also garnered support from President Donald Trump and Senator Bernie Sanders, who have separately endorsed similar ideas. This development signals a growing momentum behind the push for a cap on credit card interest rates.

news.headline: Share buyback programme in week 10 involving several stock exchanges and regulatory authorities.
news.summary: Several stock exchanges, including Nasdaq Copenhagen, London Stock Exchange, and Euronext Dublin, are facing scrutiny from the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority and other stakeholders. This stems from concerns over potential irregularities in recent financial activities. The investigation involves large sums of money and is expected to escalate in the coming weeks as more details are uncovered. The financial watchdogs are closely monitoring the situation to ensure compliance with regulations and protect investors' interests. This development has sent shockwaves through the financial community and prompted demands for greater transparency and accountability.

news.headline: Crédit Agricole Assurances plans to launch its inaugural perpetual Restricted Tier 1 notes.
news.summary: Over 100 people have been reported missing and over 50 displaced following a devastating flood in the region. The flood, which occurred due to heavy rain, has caused significant damage to over 200 homes and infrastructure. Local authorities are currently conducting search and rescue operations to locate the missing individuals. Emergency shelters have been set up to accommodate those who have been displaced. The flood has also resulted in power outages affecting over 10,000 residents in the area. The community is coming together to provide support and assistance to those affected by the natural disaster.

news.headline: KKR-led consortium raises bid for Assura to £1.6 billion.
DFI reveals edge AI solutions at Embedded World 2025, emphasizes on smart cities, industrial automation, transportation, healthcare.
news.summary: DFI, renowned for its embedded motherboards and industrial computing solutions, is set to present cutting-edge edge AI technologies at Embedded World 2025 in Taipei on March 10. The spotlight will be on applications in smart cities, industrial automation, intelligent transportation, and healthcare, highlighting the company's prowess in innovative solutions. This event is expected to attract a significant number of industry professionals and technology enthusiasts eager to explore the advancements in AI for various sectors.

news.headline: CK93 prepayments by Totalkredit A/S are highlighted in recent news updates, with significant numbers in play.
Nykredit Realkredit A/S reports gains in prepayments (CK93).

Economist El-Erian warns of US economic slowdown due to weak demand | ISM index 48.6% | Feb job report: 151k NFP, 4.1% unemployment, labor force 62.4% dip. Fed Chair Powell confirms 'solid pace' growth.
news.summary: Economist Mohamed El-Erian raised concerns about an economic slowdown during a podcast, pointing out two worrying data sets. Firstly, February's ISM Manufacturing New Orders Index dropped to 48.6% after three months of growth, signaling weakening demand. Secondly, the job report showed nonfarm payrolls increased by 151,000, while the unemployment rate rose to 4.1%, the highest in 3.5 years, leading to uncertainty in the labor market. El-Erian mentioned a slip in labor force participation as well. The worry is that companies may increase prices due to slowing growth, potentially exacerbated by tariffs. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell, on the other hand, highlighted the economy's solid pace of growth at the University of Chicago.

news.headline: Investor presentation now accessible from Crédit Agricole Assurances, offering insights and details.
Valens Semiconductor to exhibit high-performance connectivity tech at Embedded World 2025 for AI apps.
news.summary: In Hod Hasharon, Israel, on March 10, 2025, Valens Semiconductor (NYSE: VLN), a prominent player in high-performance connectivity, revealed plans to showcase its cutting-edge connectivity technology crucial for diverse AI applications at Embedded World 2025. Valens is set to exhibit...

news.headline: Manning Doherty resigns from Universal Music Group N.V. board of directors, effective March 21, 2025.contributions appreciated.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Hilversum, Netherlands, Universal Music Group N.V. (EURONEXT: UMG) revealed that Non-Executive Director Manning Doherty is set to step down from the Board of Directors on March 21, 2025. The Board expressed its gratitude for Mr. Doherty's valuable contributions during his tenure.

news.headline: Jacob Wallenberg Jr proposed as new EQT AB Board member; subject to approval at May 27, 2025 Shareholders' Meeting.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, EQT AB disclosed that their Nomination Committee has recommended Jacob Wallenberg Jr to join the Board of Directors. This proposal will undergo voting at the Annual Shareholders' Meeting scheduled for May 27, 2025. If approved, Jacob will bring valuable expertise to the company.

news.headline: i2Cool partners with Marubeni for wider adoption of electricity-free cooling tech globally. Strategic move to enhance market reach.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Hong Kong, i2Cool, a leading company specializing in electricity-free cooling technology, revealed a significant partnership with Marubeni, a major general trading company in Japan. This alliance seeks to boost worldwide usage of their innovative cooling solutions.

news.headline: Scania's 2024: Net sales grew by 6% to SEK 216.1B, operating income at SEK 30.4B, 102,069 vehicles delivered.
news.summary: Scania, based in Sweden, had a successful year in 2024 with record-breaking figures. Their net sales increased by 6% to SEK 216.1 billion, adjusted operating income rose to SEK 30.4 billion, and adjusted operating margin hit 14.1%. Deliveries also increased by 6% to 102,069 vehicles, with 266 Zero Emission Vehicles. Despite a decrease in net sales in the fourth quarter to SEK 57.4 billion, adjusted operating income increased to SEK 7.7 billion. Deliveries decreased by 3% to 28,014 vehicles, with 77 Zero Emission Vehicles. The service business revenue saw a 3% increase overall. Order intake decreased by 4% for the full year but increased by 10% in the fourth quarter. Scania achieved strong operational and financial performance, with record sales and earnings driving their success.

news.headline: Study analyzes Apple Health mobility data for post-surgery outcomes. Apple app offers metrics for health tracking.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in San Diego, it was reported that the Apple Health app offers users a comprehensive selection of metrics for monitoring different health aspects, such as heart rate, blood oxygen levels, fall risk, and daily sunlight exposure. The Apple Health mobility data has been identified as a beneficial resource for users to make use of.

news.headline: VILVI Group's February 2025 sales were EUR 22.12 million, up by 27.6% from last year. Jan-Feb 2025 sales were EUR 46.92 million, up by 31.1%.
news.summary: In February 2025, the VILVI Group, comprised of “Vilkyškių pieninė“ AB, “Modest” AB, “Kelmės pieninė“ AB, “Kelmės pienas” UAB, “Pieno logistika” AB, and “Baltic Dairy Board” SIA, recorded consolidated sales of EUR 22.12 million, showing a significant increase of 27.6% compared to February 2024. Furthermore, during the period of January to February 2025, the Group reported total sales of EUR 46.92 million, marking a notable 31.1% surge compared to the same timeframe in the previous year.

news.headline: 70,000 runners from China and Namibia compete in the 34th Rossing Marathon in Namibia, fostering connections and unity.
news.summary: In Namibia's coastal town of Swakopmund, the 34th Rossing National Marathon Championship, known as Rossing Marathon, commenced on Saturday morning. The event was officially opened with a ceremonial gunshot by Wei Jinming, the Counsellor for Economic. This significant marathon drew participants and spectators from various regions.

news.headline: PVC rigid foam market expected to reach $3.1 billion by 2033 with 4.3% CAGR. Demand driven by construction, automotive, and packaging sectors.
news.summary: The PVC rigid foam market is experiencing increased demand due to its use in various industries like construction, automotive, and packaging. Manufacturing techniques such as co-extrusion and better foaming agents have led to improved production efficiency, cost reduction, and enhancement in quality. This has driven the market growth, with estimates showing an increase in revenue to approximately $X billion in the coming years.

news.headline: Jyske Bank's share repurchase programme aims to acquire shares worth up to DKK 2.25 billion till 30 January 2026.
news.summary: Starting on 26 February 2025 until 30 January 2026, Jyske Bank will be implementing a share repurchase program. The plan involves acquiring shares worth up to DKK 2.25 billion, in accordance with Corporate Announcement No. 3/2025 dated 26 February 2025. The execution of this buyback program complies with the EU Commission Regulation No. 596/2014 known as the "Market Abuse Regulation" and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of 8 March 2016, collectively referred to as the "Safe Harbour Rules".

news.headline: Tech Mahindra opens Americas headquarters in Plano, Texas, strengthening US operations.
news.summary: Tech Mahindra, a prominent global technology consulting and digital solutions provider, recently unveiled its new Americas headquarters in Plano, Texas on March 10, 2025. This move solidifies the company's commitment to serving enterprises across various sectors. The headquarters is strategically located to cater to Tech Mahindra's expanding presence in the region, leveraging its expertise to drive innovation and growth. The company, listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE) as TECHM, aims to capitalize on the vast opportunities in the Americas market, showcasing its dedication to enhancing technological solutions on a global scale.

news.headline: Spouses of hip and knee replacement patients experience significant quality of life improvements post-surgery.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in San Diego, a recent study discovered that individuals living with osteoarthritis not only suffer from decreased quality of life but also impact their spouse's well-being. The research revealed that spouses witness substantial enhancements in their quality of life following their partner's completion of total...

news.headline: Sectigo shows importance of Certificate Lifecycle Management at CloudFest 2025 in Germany, a proud sponsor for over 20 years.
news.summary: Sectigo, a leading company in automated Certificate Lifecycle Management (CLM) and website security, has disclosed its involvement in and backing of CloudFest 2025, to be held from March 17-20 at Europa Park, Germany. A long-time sponsor of CloudFest, Sectigo extends an invitation to attendees to visit the Sectigo VIP Lounge to delve into SSL/TLS certificate management trends. This marks Sectigo's participation in CloudFest for over 20 years, highlighting its dedication to enhancing cybersecurity.

news.headline: China Foreign Ministry, on US plans to levy fees on China-linked ships: Such activities violate the global supply and industrial chain and stability.
China Foreign Ministry, on Canadian election: We will continue to grow bilateral relations with Canada on a basis of mutual cooperation
China refuting "overcapacity" claims in green energy sectors, with strong efforts towards a greener future.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Beijing, Liu Jieyi, a senior official of the 14th National Committee of the Chinese People's Political, refuted claims accusing China of "overcapacity" in green energy sectors. Liu Jieyi criticized these narratives during a recent news report from chinadaily.com.cn. The official emphasized China's commitment to green energy initiatives and highlighted the country's significant achievements in this sector. The statement aims to counter prevailing misconceptions about China's energy policies and underscores the nation's leadership in sustainable energy production.

news.headline: Study at AAOS reveals prior authorization ineffective for cost control in hip surgeries, delays care.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in San Diego, a study presented at the 2025 Annual Meeting of the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons revealed significant insights regarding prior authorization use in cost control with commercial insurance providers. The examination highlighted that this practice is standard among insurance companies to manage costs. The data presented underscores the impact of prior authorization on the healthcare system and patient care. The findings stress the need for further evaluation of these policies to ensure efficient and effective healthcare delivery.

news.headline: Japan's PM Ishiba: BoJ is implementing various measures for stable prices
Japan's PM Ishiba: BoJ is close to achieving its goal
Study suggests stopping GLP-1 agonists 14 days before joint surgery to lower anesthesia risks.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025 in San Diego, it was reported that GLP-1 agonists like semaglutide (e.g., Ozempic) have shown effectiveness in managing type 2 diabetes and obesity. These drugs have made a positive impact in the perioperative phase of significant surgeries.

news.headline: Hoffmann Green's H-UKR cement receives world premiere approval as 0% clinker cement, showcasing technological innovation.
news.summary: In Chaillé-sous-les-Ormeaux, France, Hoffmann Green Cement Technologies (ISIN: FR0013451044, Ticker: ALHGR) has announced the acquisition of a Technical Approval (ATEc) for its H-UKR cement. This marks a significant milestone as it is the first time a 0% clinker cement has received such approval. Hoffmann Green Cement, dedicated to reducing carbon footprint in construction, specializes in innovative clinker-free cements. The Company's technological expertise is reaffirmed with this achievement, showcasing their leadership in sustainable construction solutions.

news.headline: Most racket sport players can return to play at similar level after Joint Arthroplasty. New study at AAOS 2025 found...
news.summary: In San Diego on March 10, 2025, it was reported that the popularity of activities like pickleball is increasing. However, information regarding resuming sports post joint arthroplasty (JA) is scarce. Research unveiled at the 2025 Annual Meeting of the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (AAOS) indicates a rise in interest, with fresh data on returning to physical activities post JA unveiling promising statistics.

news.headline: PCI Pal and RingCentral collaborate for secure payments, customer experience via embedded integration.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - PCI Pal has revealed a new collaboration and integrated partnership with RingCentral to guarantee secure and compliant payment processes and improve overall customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Study at AAOS meeting shows USSF's heading policy reduced youth soccer concussion rates.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in San Diego, findings from a recent research were unveiled at the 2025 Annual Meeting of the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (AAOS). The study focused on analyzing the effects of a strategy introduced by the United States Soccer Federation (USSF) aimed at regulating heading the soccer ball among young players.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart: Strongest - NZD, JPY, AUD, CHF, CAD, EUR, USD, GBP - Weakest
Companies collaborate to form an acquisition and development company for off-grid data center power projects to address energy needs.
news.summary: Initiatives are underway to cater to the energy requirements of data centers by providing a substantial amount of available power within a timeframe of two years.
